## Meeting Purpose

[Catching up and discussing personal/professional experiences](https://fathom.video/share/m34AR-7w4jxuUybeDA8y1TH9hrru7tLc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Balancing work, family, and personal health is an ongoing challenge](https://fathom.video/share/m34AR-7w4jxuUybeDA8y1TH9hrru7tLc?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Carilu and Marcel both make efforts to exercise regularly despite busy schedules](https://fathom.video/share/m34AR-7w4jxuUybeDA8y1TH9hrru7tLc?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

## Topics

### Fitting in Exercise

  - [Marcel tries to workout in the mornings to have more energy for family time later](https://fathom.video/share/m34AR-7w4jxuUybeDA8y1TH9hrru7tLc?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Carilu went to the gym after dropping kids off to fit it into her schedule](https://fathom.video/share/m34AR-7w4jxuUybeDA8y1TH9hrru7tLc?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [They discussed the challenges of staying active with young children](https://fathom.video/share/m34AR-7w4jxuUybeDA8y1TH9hrru7tLc?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Parenting Experiences

  - [Marcel has a 15-month-old daughter who recently fell and injured her lip](https://fathom.video/share/m34AR-7w4jxuUybeDA8y1TH9hrru7tLc?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Carilu's 12 and 15-year-old daughters are involved in sports like gymnastics and volleyball](https://fathom.video/share/m34AR-7w4jxuUybeDA8y1TH9hrru7tLc?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Dealing with childhood injuries and trying to make accommodations](https://fathom.video/share/m34AR-7w4jxuUybeDA8y1TH9hrru7tLc?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)

### Marcel's Difficult Past Experience

  - [At a previous company, the CEO mistreated Marcel unethically](https://fathom.video/share/m34AR-7w4jxuUybeDA8y1TH9hrru7tLc?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [They clawed back his shares/compensation in a violating way](https://fathom.video/share/m34AR-7w4jxuUybeDA8y1TH9hrru7tLc?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [It was an emotionally crushing experience, made more difficult by personal challenges like miscarriages](https://fathom.video/share/m34AR-7w4jxuUybeDA8y1TH9hrru7tLc?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [Carilu empathized with the pain of major professional/financial losses](https://fathom.video/share/m34AR-7w4jxuUybeDA8y1TH9hrru7tLc?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
